subject: Image of the dust-scattering halo around SGR 1806-20
body:
K.L. Page (U. Leicester) & N. Gehrels (NASA/GSFC) report on behalf of the 
Swift-XRT team:

As an addendum to yesterday's GCN Circular (number 5438) about the
detection of a dust-scattering halo around SGR 1806-20, please find
available an image of the expanding halo at:

http://www.swift.ac.uk/SGR1806.shtml
